source_pr.title: plan: remove useless plan.
source_pr.body:
For query t1 left join t2 left join t3 order by t1.a limit 1, there will be a topn operator between two joins. That is a redundant operator.

@winoros @lamxTyler PTAL

symptoms: sql: "select * from t t1 left join t t2 on t1.b = t2.b left join t t3 on t2.b = t3.b order by t1.a limit 1", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select * from t t1 left join t t2 on t1.b = t2.b left join t t3 on t2.b = t3.b order by t1.a limit 1", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR/patch looks like a correctness/refactor/feature change without a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization for the picked test. Keep as insufficient evidence until CI logs or a reliable repro is available.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: sql: "select * from t t1 left join t t2 on t1.b = t2.b left join t t3 on t2.b = t3.b order by t1.a limit 1", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
files: plan/dag_plan_test.go, plan/logical_plans.go, plan/new_physical_plan_builder.go, plan/plans.go, plan/task.go, plan/topn_push_down.go
